title: Validate hang mitigation across parallel pytest execution
description: Run the relevant automated test coverage for the timeout configuration, storage subprocess safeguards, and test setup hardening to confirm pytest no longer hangs indefinitely near the end of the xdist run.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted automated validation covers the modified storage and test modules.
`uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q` or an equivalent high-signal validation run completes without reproducing the prior indefinite hang.
If any test still blocks, the failure surfaces through pytest-timeout or the new thread liveness assertion rather than an indefinite stall.
conflict_risks:
None. Only `tests/helpers.py` was modified; no overlap with other in-progress beads expected.
None — only `src/agent_takt/storage.py` was touched and no sibling beads claim that file.
None — only `test_scheduler_beads.py` was touched, a single test method body.
